gist.headline: Spreading our wings globally
gist.blurb: We've expanded our gpt-image-2 model across five global regions to keep your image generations fast and reliable. More servers, more art, zero bottlenecks!
gist.summary: Distributed gpt-image-2 traffic across five global regions to ensure high availability and consistent generation speeds.
gist.impact: Users will experience highly reliable image generation with significantly increased capacity for concurrent requests.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a global traffic router. Five glowing server-plants distributed across a cozy pixel map or globe, representing the five new Azure regions. The bee is happily watering or tending to all of them.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny pilot's hat, flying over a small pixelated globe with five glowing lime green (#ecf874) server-plants sprouting from it. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
